protocol_name: Stage2 real state-identifiability / future grounding protocol v2

task_definition.query: given a historical object / mask query, recover the same target from future state / future candidate masks

dataset_policy.VSPW: scene/stuff supplemental only; excluded from main protocol

item_selection_rules.panel_balance_policy: fill panel targets first, then top up globally with highest-ranked remaining items
item_selection_rules.no_leakage_policy: validation split only, no train overlap, unique protocol_item_id per selected target
item_selection_rules.no_overlap_policy: same protocol_item_id cannot appear twice in full protocol
